title: Dupatya weddelliana
taxonomy: Dupatya weddelliana is classified within the family Icacinaceae and the order Icacinales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all types of plant life. The genus Dupatya is a part of the Icacinaceae family, which consists of flowering plants. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between different plant species. The family Icacinaceae is primarily composed of tropical and subtropical flowering plants.
uses: Dupatya weddelliana is reportedly used in traditional medicine in the Himalayas. It is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
